mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PostAdoption( postadoption_publisher_id, gender, breed, city, district, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_wechat, description, status, created_at_postadoption ) VALUES( #{publisher.id}, #{gender}, #{breed}, #{city}, #{district}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactWechat}, #{description}, #{status.value}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT p.postadoption_id AS id, p.gender, p.breed, p.city, p.district, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.contact_wechat, p.description, p.status, p.created_at_postadoption, u.user_id AS u_id, u.username AS u_name, u.phone AS u_phone, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM PostAdoption p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.postadoption_publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE p.postadoption_id = #{id}

SELECT p.postadoption_id AS id, p.gender, p.breed, p.city, p.district, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.contact_wechat, p.description, p.status, p.created_at_postadoption, u.user_id AS u_id, u.username AS u_name, u.phone AS u_phone, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM PostAdoption p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.postadoption_publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE 1=1 AND p.status = #{status} AND p.city = #{city} AND p.gender = #{gender} AND p.breed LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breed}, '%') ORDER BY p.created_at_postadoption DESC

SELECT p.postadoption_id AS id, p.gender, p.breed, p.city, p.district, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.contact_wechat, p.description, p.status, p.created_at_postadoption, u.user_id AS u_id, u.username AS u_name, u.phone AS u_phone, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM PostAdoption p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.postadoption_publisher_id = u.user_id WHERE p.postadoption_publisher_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at_postadoption DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE PostAdoption SET gender = #{gender}, breed = #{breed}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_wechat = #{contactWechat}, description = #{description}, status = #{status.value} WHERE postadoption_id = #{id}
